title: Data Retention and Monitoring Policy
body:
### Data Retention and Monitoring Policy

This policy outlines the retention periods for various types of corporate data and the monitoring practices in place.

**Email Retention**
All corporate emails are retained for 7 years from the date of creation.

**Document Retention**
Business documents, including contracts, reports, and financial records, are retained for 10 years.

**Video Conferencing Recordings**
Recordings of video conferences are retained for 3 years.

**Chat Logs**
Chat logs from internal messaging platforms are retained indefinitely unless otherwise specified.

**Access Monitoring**
All access to sensitive data is logged and reviewed quarterly.

---
Last reviewed: 2025-05-15

title: Acceptable Use Policy
body:
### Acceptable Use Policy

Company systems and data must be used only for legitimate business purposes. Users are prohibited from accessing, distributing, or storing illegal content. Personal use is permitted provided it does not interfere with job responsibilities or violate other policies.

title: Incident Response Plan
body:
### Incident Response Plan

This plan defines the steps for responding to security incidents. All suspected incidents must be reported to the SOC within 1 hour of discovery. The response team will assess severity and escalate according to the classification matrix.
